history.qwen_observation: Compilation failed during Spring Boot 3.3 upgrade because Hibernate 6 removed the internal class CurrentTimestampFunction used in Task.java.
history.qwen_rationale: Inserting org.openrewrite.hibernate.MigrateToHibernate66 before the Spring Boot 3 upgrade will transform Hibernate 5-specific internal API usages to their Hibernate 6 equivalents, allowing the build to succeed when the dependency version is bumped.

history.qwen_observation: MigrateToHibernate66 changed javax.persistence imports to jakarta.persistence in the source code, but the build was still on Spring Boot 2.7 (which provides javax.persistence), causing package jakarta.persistence does not exist compilation errors.
history.qwen_rationale: Reorder the chain to run UpgradeSpringBoot_3_3 before MigrateToHibernate66. The Spring Boot 3 upgrade will migrate the project to jakarta.* namespaces and update dependencies to Hibernate 6, ensuring jakarta.persistence is on the classpath before the Hibernate 6.6 migration recipe modifies the code.

history.qwen_observation: The build failed at upgrade_spring_boot_3_3 because Spring Boot 3.3 brings in Hibernate 6, but the source code still references Hibernate 5 internal APIs (CurrentTimestampFunction), and the migrate_hibernate_6 step was scheduled after the failing step so it never executed.
history.qwen_rationale: By combining UpgradeSpringBoot_3_3 and MigrateToHibernate66 into a single step, the POM is updated to Spring Boot 3.3 (providing Hibernate 6 and Jakarta dependencies) and the Hibernate 5-specific code is migrated to Hibernate 6 syntax before the post-step compilation occurs, preventing the missing package/symbol errors.

history.qwen_observation: Compilation failed after Spring Boot 3.3 upgrade because Task.java references org.hibernate.query.criteria.internal.expression.function.CurrentTimestampFunction, a Hibernate 5 internal API removed in Hibernate 6.
history.qwen_rationale: The UpgradeSpringBoot_3_3 meta-recipe updates dependencies to Hibernate 6, but the source code still imports a removed internal package. Running MigrateToHibernate66 alongside it should apply Hibernate 5-to-6 API transformations. Adding JavaxMigrationToJakarta explicitly ensures namespace migration completes before compilation. Keeping them in a single step ensures the AST is transformed before the post-step mvn compile check.
